title: Anti-incumbency days are over in West Bengal: Kolkata gets ‘double-engine’ government after 50 years
description: From 2011 to 2026, Mamata Banerjee's TMC faced significant clashes with the BJP-led Centre. The 2026 elections show a decisive BJP victory, ending Banerjee's 15-year rule and establishing a double-engine government in West Bengal for the first time in nearly 50 years.
